title: Completion Envelope
description: Shared completion-envelope schema. See agents/shared/completion-envelope.md for the full protocol and compat/*.md for pilot-repo field mappings.

project.description: Not present in either pilot repo's current envelope; optional addition.

flowType.description: Optional; carried forward from job-context.flowType for convenience.

riskLevel.description: Not present in either pilot repo today. Optional.

branch.description: Adopted from AIM's design, not present in Reqon's current envelope schema (though Reqon's orchestrator does derive a branch name separately). Once set by Engineer, every later stage must copy it forward unchanged rather than reconstruct it.

assumptions.description: Not present in either pilot repo's current envelope. Optional.

findings.description: Not present in either pilot repo's current envelope. Optional - primarily used by advisory-style roles or the Security/Performance review workflows when run as primary role.

artifacts.description: Key -> path map. Reqon's real job history shows drift toward a renamed 'artifactPaths' key on some stage-specific envelopes - 'artifacts' is canonical; don't rename it.

validation.description: Not present in either pilot repo's current envelope as a structured field (both narrate validation results in prose within the artifact document instead). Optional structured mirror.

productionImpact.description: Not present in either pilot repo's current envelope as a structured field. Optional; see templates/production-impact.md for the fuller narrative version.

metrics.description: New — serves standards/portfolio-goals.md's Build Speed and Token Optimization goals. Not present in either pilot repo's current envelope; optional, self-reported by the agent that writes the envelope (best-effort, not independently audited). Absence doesn't block anything; presence is what turns the credit-efficiency/autonomy design into measured data.

model.description: The model this stage actually ran as, e.g. claude-opus-4-8 — compare against agents/shared credit-efficiency.md's model-tier guidance for this role.

wallClockSeconds.description: Elapsed time for this stage, start to envelope-write.

toolCalls.description: Count of tool invocations this stage made, if easily countable.

tokensUsed.description: Best-effort; omit fields that aren't available rather than guessing.
